name: opsx
description: Codex port of the orchestrated OpenSpec apply workflow using Codex subagents and openspec-cn. Requires the agency-agents catalog at ~/.agency-agents (install per the README); a role it cannot resolve there halts the run rather than standing in a fabricated expert.

interface.longDescription: Apply OpenSpec changes by grouping pending tasks by scope, delegating implementation to Codex subagents, and keeping the main agent focused on OpenSpec state management and review.
